content:
# Recommendations — after iter-026

## Headline: the in-cone SNAP assoc chain is DONE
B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` closed axiom-clean ⇒ the entire B1–B7 ∀L associativity coherence of
`⊕ₘ Γ(L^⊗m)` is complete. Combined with the iter-001 DELIVERED goal seed `Grassmannian.represents`
(sorry-free, axiom-clean), **there is no remaining in-cone prover work**. The 3 SNAP sorries left are
the deferred commutativity chain (below). The 4 χ sorries (QuotScheme) are a separate deferred leg.

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked, structural)
- `sectionsMul_mul_comm`, `tensorPowAdd_comm`, `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`
  (SectionGradedRing.lean ~L3435/3450/3492). All `[IsInvertible L]`-gated; **no consumer**
  (`GCommSemiring` unbuilt). `sectionsMul_mul_comm` is **FALSE** for general `L` (counterexample
  `L = 𝒪²`; section ring = free tensor algebra). These are FUTURE work only — assign ONLY if a
  consumer (`GCommSemiring` upgrade, Stacks §17.25/01CR) is genuinely scheduled, and only under the
  invertibility hypothesis. Otherwise leave as honest typed sorries.
- 4 χ sorries (`QuotScheme.lean`): χ-semantic (`Φ(m)=χ=Σᵢ(-1)ⁱ dim Hⁱ`), need higher cohomology this
  i=0 leg lacks. Fill from the cohomology leg at merge-back. NEVER build an H⁰ `Φ_s` under the χ label.

## Cleanup (cosmetic, next prover/refactor touch — review cannot edit .lean)
- **Stale comment** SectionGradedRing.lean @L3181: "REMAINING BLOCKER" inside the now-closed
  `tensorPowAdd_assoc` succ branch (B6 closed iter-025). Delete/reword on the next edit to that file.
  Non-blocking (lean-auditor minor).

## Reusable proof pattern discovered (Knowledge Base)
- **Section/element-level assembly dodges the comp-instance diamond entirely.** B7 closed by a pure
  `rw`-chain of element-level naturality slides (`sectionsMul_whisker{Right,Left}_natural`) + B5
  backwards, finishing on a single `congrArg` of the iso-level pentagon (B6) at a common base element
  `z`. Because functor-comp / `Iso.trans_hom` / `sectionsCast_apply` are all `rfl` at the element
  level, the `LocalizedMonoidal`/`X.Modules` diamond that forced the generic-`M` core for B6 (iter-025)
  NEVER surfaces here. Lesson: when a coherence can be stated/consumed at the section (element) level,
  prefer that to the morphism/iso level — the diamond is a morphism-level artifact.
- **μ-slide naturality = exact parallel of `tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul`.** `sectionsMul F G = η_{F⊗_p G}.app(op⊤)`;
  `(tensorObjWhiskerRightIso e G).hom = sheafification.map (whiskerRight (toPresheaf e.hom)(toPresheaf G))`;
  the slide = η-naturality along that presheaf whisker, with `e1`/`hw` = rfl. iso form `e : F ≅ F'`
  is the consumed instance (suffices: assoc leg feeds `e = tensorPowAdd`, an iso).

## Blueprint / merge-back (deferred, NOT this loop)
- Blueprint-doctor out-of-cone broken refs persist (Cohomology_FlatBaseChange covers 2 nonexistent
  files + 14 `\ref`; GlueDescent 4 `\cref`/`\uses`; QuotScheme 13 `\cref`). These are EXTRACTION
  artifacts outside the 3-seed cone — resolve at merge-back reconciliation, do NOT edit here.
- 343 `lean_aux` unmatched nodes = inherited Grassmannian.*/GradedModule.* + exempt private helpers;
  merge-back debt, not in-cone.

## Suggested next-iter posture
No live prover lane for SNAP. Either (a) close out this sub-project as DELIVERED (goal seed +
full associativity coherence, both axiom-clean) and move the loop to the merge-back / χ-cohomology
leg, or (b) if the planner intends the `GCommSemiring` upgrade, FIRST build a consumer + the
`[IsInvertible L]` infrastructure (`Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl`, local-to-global)
before assigning the comm chain — do not assign comm sorries with no consumer.
